/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/BumperDetection.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libBumperDetection.so -o libBumperDetection.so CMakeFiles/BumperDetection.dir/src/yolomodelgpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BumperDetection.dir/src/edgeDetection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BumperDetection.dir/src/kalmanFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BumperDetection.dir/src/topDownView.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.13.0 -lleptonica -ltesseract -larchive -lcurl -lrknnrt /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.13.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.13.0
